description: Create a content slide titled 'JPMF: How to subscribe' with a vertical five-step subscription process flow on top and a five-column timeline table example across the bottom.

steps.label: Shareholder Application
steps.sub: Due to Transfer Agent 5 business days before Trade Date

steps.label: Shareholder Funds Investment
steps.sub: Due 3 business days before Trade Date and placed in escrow

steps.label: Trade Date
steps.sub: First business day of the month

steps.label: Shares Issued to Investors
steps.sub: Typically the next business day after Month-end NAV is finalized

rows: Shareholder application due to transfer agent
Trade date (first business date of the month)
